title: Skill Variables Schema
description: Defines typed, scoped configuration variables for a Ship smart skill.

type.description: Variable type. Determines validation and UI control.

default.description: Default value when no user state is set. Type must match the 'type' field.

storage-hint.description: Where user values are stored. global = machine-wide, local = this project only (personal), project = this project (team-shared).

values.description: Allowed values for enum type. Validated on set and at compile time.

label.description: Human-readable name shown in Studio and CLI output.

description.description: Longer explanation shown in Studio tooltips and the docs site.
